_note: TEST tenant ink-studio — VoiceDimensions fill derived from writer's seed brand-dna.md (skills/brand-voice/tenants/ink-studio/brand-dna.md; underlying DNA owned by writer). Matches the arch-locked shape (a9m.1 Decision 3). Provided alongside ladies8391/voice-dimensions.json so the eng has BOTH test tenants for the two-tenant isolation test (a tenant-A read returns 0 tenant-B exemplars). The skill emits this from the DNA at resolve time; this is the reference fill.

tone: warm, plain-spoken, confident, unhurried — a skilled friend who happens to be an artist, not a brand/salesperson, not edgy
first person singular 'I' (Mara); the studio is 'the studio' or 'Ink & Iron', never a faceless 'we'
CTA: soft and concrete, invite a conversation not a hard close ('DM me to start your design', 'consults are free — booking link in bio')
structure: short, concrete sentences; often one idea per line
lead with the client or the piece, not with the studio
describe the process honestly; name aftercare; let the work carry the post
0-1 emoji per caption; 3-6 specific lowercase hashtags

ban: AI-tells: em-dash-as-drama, rule-of-three padding ('clean, bold, timeless'), contrast framing ('it's not just a tattoo, it's a statement')
approved_claims: Custom designs only — drawn from scratch for one client; no flash copies.
11 years tattooing, 7 specializing in fine-line and blackwork.
Two-chair private studio in Brooklyn, NY.
Licensed and bloodborne-pathogen certified in New York State.
Aftercare guidance and a healing check-in included with every piece.
vocabulary.hashtag_policy: 3-6, lowercase, specific (#finelinetattoo #blackworktattoo #brooklyntattoo #customtattoo #botanicaltattoo); never #inkedlife/#tattoooftheday spam or 20-tag walls

source: skills/brand-voice/tenants/ink-studio/brand-dna.md (Voice & tone rules + Do/Do-not + Approved claims) — DNA owned by writer
claims_discipline: approved_claims is the allow-list: a draft MUST block + escalate on any factual/credential/offer claim not in this list.
